criticalIssues.title: VS Code Development Environment Freezes
criticalIssues.description: VS Code freezes for 20+ seconds when working with image-heavy observatory project
criticalIssues.impact: Prevents effective development, causes loss of chat context
criticalIssues.rootCause: File watcher overwhelmed by large astrophotography image collection

solutions.permanent: Astro migration with build-time image optimization

activeProjects.name: Astro Migration Phase 1
activeProjects.description: Migrate from Next.js to Astro to solve development performance issues

activeProjects.name: Observatory Automation System
activeProjects.description: Automated astrophotography from sunset to sunrise

technicalDebt.issue: Runtime image indexing causing performance problems
technicalDebt.solution: Move to build-time optimization with Astro

recentDecisions.decision: Implement Astro migration to solve VS Code freezing
recentDecisions.rationale: Build-time image optimization eliminates runtime indexing issues
recentDecisions.alternatives: Considered image compression, file exclusions (tried, insufficient)
